identity.mission: Create a 'Luxury Medical Spa' aesthetic that breaks generic dental tropes. Fusion of 'Swiss Precision' and 'Hospitality Warmth'.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix dental clinical trust with spa-like luxury.
Emotion First: Every pixel must whisper 'Comfort' and 'Exclusivity'.
Content is King: Directed storytelling, not just information dumping.
Zoom In: Intimate close-ups of smiles and textures.
Negative Space: Luxurious breathing room (3x standard spacing).
Contrast: High contrast typography (Serif Headings vs Sans Body).
anti_patterns: No 'Clinical Blue' (Standard #007AFF is banned). Use Deep Navy or Teal.
No flat, boring white backgrounds. Use 'Pearl White' or textured subtle noise.

theme.name: Luxury Medical Spa
theme.description: A sophisticated, high-end aesthetic inspired by 5-star hotels and premium wellness centers.

accent.name: Gold
accent.usage: Divider lines, Icons, Subtle Highlights, Borders

highlight.name: Soft Teal
highlight.usage: Secondary Buttons, Success States, Soft Background Accents

rules: Headings: tracking-tight, leading-none, font-semibold or font-light (mix weights).
Overlines: Uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs, Gold color.

grids.services: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris). Mix wide spans with tall spans. Don't use uniform cards.
grids.doctors: Asymmetric List or Staggered Grid. Avoid simple 4-column row.

surfaces.glassmorphism: Use for Sticky Header and Floating Actions. bg-pearl/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20.
surfaces.cards: Flat Pearl White or White with 1px Gold/10 border. Soft ambient shadow: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)].

header.elements: Logo (Text/Icon), Nav Links (DM Sans), Book Now Button (Gold pill shape)

hero.elements: Large Serif Headline, Gold Accent Line, Floating Image (Parallax), Booking CTA

buttons.primary: bg-navy text-white hover:bg-navy/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: border border-gold text-navy hover:bg-gold/10 rounded-full px-8 py-6

services_grid.cards: Minimalist, Icon or Number large, Title serif, hidden details revealed on hover.

forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-navy/20 focus:border-navy rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-navy/40

hero.alt: Luxury Dental Care - Woman holding mirror

motion.parallax: Use 'useScroll' and 'useTransform' for Hero image and Service cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'DM Sans' in index.css immediately.
2. CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (navy, pearl, gold, teal).
3. HEADER: Create a 'floating' glass header. It should be transparent at top, and become glass on scroll.
4. HERO: Implement the Parallax effect. Text on Left, Image on Right (overlapping slightly).
5. SERVICES: Do NOT use a basic grid. Use the 'Bento' layout defined above.
6. ADMIN: Keep it simple. Use localStorage. Create a hidden route '/admin' protected by a simple password check (e.g. 'admin123').
7. BOOKING: Store appointments in localStorage 'appointments' array. Show them in Admin panel.
8. MAP: Use a Google Maps embed iframe for Dhaka (centered on generic Gulshan/Banani area).
9. TEST IDs: Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
